title: Trading
author: Waitwhatih-o_O
selftext: Asalamualaikum. I hope you all are doing great. I have a small proposal which would eventually help me and you. So I’ve been learning and Allhamdulillah it turned out good as I’m able to teach others too. I’m not the best in the game but after staring at the charts for endless hours and studying I’ve come to a place where I’m able to help others out. So I’ve an offer. I want to give you trades, where we will split the profits 50/50. You’ll have to put my referral on your account if we are using the same broker. After I’ve made 1000$, I’ll stop taking 50% of your profits and will start to give you 1-2 trades daily for free. Your money, you handle it, I do the work and give you a trade. Incase if you’re wondering why I’m doing this, I’m in not so good shape right now and I need to raise capital, simple. We are two partners who work on two different edges. And not just that, I’ll teach you how my trades go as they go. Hoping for a positive reply. Thank you very much.
